tools.name: brave_web_search
tools.description: Performs web search using Brave Search API. Ideal for general queries, news, articles, and online content. Supports pagination, content filtering, and freshness controls. Maximum 20 results per request.

tools.name: brave_local_search
tools.description: Searches for local businesses and places using Brave's Local Search API. Best for queries about physical locations, businesses, restaurants, services. Returns business names, addresses, ratings, phone numbers, and opening hours. Falls back to web search if no local results found.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Local search query (e.g., 'pizza near Central Park')
